chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

text: 1565 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عُقْبَةُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ: عَنْ رَجُلٍ دَعَاهُ رَجُلٌ وَ هُوَ يُصَلِّي فَسَهَا فَأَجَابَهُ بِحَاجَتِهِ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ قَالَ «يَمْضِي عَلَى صَلاَتِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1565 - Uqbah ibn Khalid asked Him (Imam Abu Abdullah (as)) about a man who was praying and another man called out to him, causing him to become distracted and respond to the person's request. What should he do?
Imam (as) said: "He should continue with his prayer."
